PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  wd:Q213959 wdt:P1346 ?competition .
  ?competition wdt:P580 ?start .
  FILTER(?start <= "2018-12-31T23:59:59Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  ?game wdt:P361 ?competition .
  ?game wdt:P1545 1 .
  ?game wdt:P1296 ?attendance .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
